title: Simple Trims
description: allow for the dynamic creation of armor trim materials without dealing with paletted permutations
body: # Simple Trims _Armor Trim Materials are way too hard to make. Let's fix that._ Simple Trims is a mod that re-implements the system to create Armor Trim Materials. It also solves another problem, allowing almost any modded armor to be trimmed. --- _Thanks to [@nova_quinn1010](https://www.twitter.com/@nova_quinn1010) for helping with this backdrop!_ --- You can read more about the mod, including a wiki on how to use the system on the mod's [GitHub](https://github.com/diamonddevv/simple-trims) page. ### Fabric - Requires Fabric API ### Quilt - Requires QSL/QFAPI (Quilt Standard Libraries)
